optOut.be-resilient: static brochure site, offline not needed; core content is plain HTML so progressive enhancement already holds
optOut.be-agent-ready: no agent-facing surface yet; not exposing WebMCP tools
optOut.be-internationalised: single-locale site, English only, no locale-sensitive data

intent.be-sustainable: image-led marketing site; hero imagery is intentionally rich but must stay optimised and lazy-loaded
intent.maximize-content-reduce-noise: the consent banner is legally required in our jurisdiction and must remain until dismissed
